## 4 · The factor A/Bs (seed-matched, loopworld, N=400×3 seeds)

| factor | OFF | ON | note |
|---|---|---|---|
| lensBias | 25.6% | 30.2% | matching-flavor share at full affinity (18% relative); contract target ≈ +10–20% relative across a run |
| diamondProximity | 23.8% | 31.5% | near-centroid card share at distance ≈ 0 (33% relative) |
| antiRepeat | 26.0% | 21.7% | immediate-repeat rate (memory 5, factor 0.5) |
| bandNoise | 0.0% | 19.3% | adjacent-leak rate at a worn meter (p default 0.2) |

*Every switch ships OFF; the OFF column is the shipped behavior. The ON deltas are each factor's isolated drift, per the ratified guardrail.*
